---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/ravi_mandliya
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mandliya/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/mandliya

---

Hello My Name is Ravi Mandliya. I am a curious learner. My interests include Recommendation Systems, Machine Learning and Deep Learning.  I love diving deep into these fields and finding practical ways to apply their principles in real-world scenarios.
